title: Async methods should return void or Future
description: Ensures that methods intended to be asynchronous return either void or a Future, which is necessary for proper async execution and error handling in Java. Returning other types can lead to unexpected behavior or lost exceptions.
recommendation: Review all async methods and ensure their return type is either void or Future. Refactor methods returning other types to comply with this rule.
impact: Non-compliant async methods may not execute as intended, and exceptions may not be properly propagated or handled, leading to bugs that are difficult to diagnose.

checks.message: Async method does not return void or Future.
